title: JFrog Evidence
description: Represents an evidence attestation in the JFrog Platform, providing a cryptographically signed record of an external process performed on a software artifact, build, package, or release bundle. Evidence is stored as in-toto statements wrapped in DSSE (Dead Simple Signing Envelope) format.

subject_type.description: Type of the subject the evidence is attached to

sha256.description: SHA-256 digest of the subject artifact

predicate_type.description: URI identifying the predicate type (in-toto attestation type)

predicate.description: The evidence predicate content conforming to the predicate_type schema

dsse_envelope_path.description: Path to the DSSE signed envelope file stored in Artifactory

signature_algorithm.description: Cryptographic algorithm used for signing the evidence

key_alias.description: Alias of the public key registered for signature verification

verified.description: Whether the evidence signature has been successfully verified

created.description: Timestamp when the evidence was created

created_by.description: User or service that created the evidence
